title: Judge Essentials Stainless Steel 3 Tier Steamer 24cm, Vented Glass Lid, Integral Casserole Pot, Oven Safe, Induction Ready
features: SAVE TIME AND MONEY - versatile vegetable steamer and rice cooker allows you to cook multiple foods at once - simply fill the bottom pan with water, heat and let steam rise up through the holes. Steamer pan can also be used as an oven-safe casserole dish.
TOUGHENED GLASS LID - reinforced with a stainless steel rim and a vent hole to allow evaporation while your food is being steamed
SOLID STAINLESS STEEL - designed in Bristol, England and made from mirror-polished stainless steel for reliable performance and years of use
INDUCTION-READY AND DISHWASHER SAFE - 'hot forged' base ensures you get great performance on all kinds of hob including gas, halogen, ceramic, solid plate, induction or aga hot plates
10 YEAR GUARANTEE - Judge has been trusted by families all over the world for its traditional family values, high performance products and award-winning customer service
description: From the manufacturer ABOUT JUDGE ESSENTIALS Judge pans have been a favourite in homes for more than a century and are known all over the world for their high quality and impressive performance. The Judge Essentials collection gives you all the performance and long life of induction-ready stainless steel at a great value. KEY FEATURES: Stainless Steel with Thermic Induction-Ready base Toughened glass lid, with vent to prevent overboiling Time-saving internal measuring guides Dishwasher Safe Suitable for Gas, Electric, Induction, Halogen, Ceramic, & Solid Plate Oven Safe PEACE OF MIND Judge is a long-established British firm, based in Bristol, England, built on traditional family values. You can buy with reassurance thanks to their outstanding quality. OVEN SAFE HANDLE Stainless steel handles allows for versatile cooking from hob to oven. EASY TO CLEAN Smooth, mirror-polish stainless steel pans are dishwasher safe. IMPRESSIVE PERFORMANCE Designed to give outstanding cooking results on all types of hob.
